case_title: ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC VS. COREY CAUGHLIN et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CAUGHLIN, COREY DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-01-2010

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-22-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
